metadata_details.purpose: Parser for PingProtect logs using the OCSF mapping to normalise events into the AI-SIEM schema.
metadata_details.dependency_summary: Requires ingestion of the original PingProtect authentication logs.
metadata_details.performance_impact: Minimal – this parser processes PingProtect security events.
metadata_details.tags: ping, pingprotect, authentication, security, ocsf, parser

analysis.semantic_summary: Parser processes PingProtect security events focused on authentication, access management, and role assignments. It normalizes events into OCSF schema, capturing user actions, MFA challenges, secret reads, and role deletions with associated metadata and actor information.
optimization_opportunities: Consolidate similar field mappings into reusable patterns
Add input validation for required fields
Implement error handling for malformed JSON
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: pingprotect-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Account Change (3001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:30:36.909386

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Cached activity mappings for performance
local ACTIVITY_MAPPINGS = {
  ["SECRET.READ"] = {id = 5, name = "Read"},
  ["ROLE_ASSIGNMENT.DELETED"] = {id = 3, name = "Delete"},
  ["MFA.CHALLENGE"] = {id = 99, name = "Other"}
}

-- Cached status mappings
local STATUS_MAPPINGS = {
  SUCCESS = {id = 1, name = "Success"},
  FAILURE = {id = 2, name = "Failure"}
}

local function get_nested_value(t, path)
  local current = t
  for segment in path:gmatch("[^%.]+") do
    if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end
    current = current[segment]
  end
  return current
end

function transform(record)
  -- Input validation with early return
  if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
    return nil, "Invalid input record"
  end

  -- Initialize output with required OCSF fields
  local output = {
    class_uid = 3001,
    class_name = "Account Change",
    category_uid = 3, 
    category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
    type_uid = 300101,
    severity_id = 1,
    severity = "Informational",
    metadata = {
      product = {
        vendor_name = "Ping Identity",
        name = "PingProtect",
        category = "security"
      }
    },
    actor = {
      user = {},
      app = {}
    },
    src_endpoint = {},
    resource = {}
  }

  -- Optimized field mapping using nested value getter
  local field_mappings = {
    {"timestamp", "unmapped.timestamp"},
    {"recorded_at", "unmapped.recordedAt"},
    {"actor.app.name", "unmapped.actors.client.id"},
    {"actor.user.uid", "unmapped.actors.user.id"},
    {"src_endpoint.ip", "unmapped.source.ip"},
    {"activity_name", "unmapped.action.type"},
    {"activity_desc", "unmapped.action.description"},
    {"resource.uid", "unmapped.resources.application.id"},
    {"status_detail", "unmapped.result.status"},
    {"message", "unmapped.result.description"}
  }

  -- Perform field mappings
  for _, mapping in ipairs(field_mappings) do
    local target, source = mapping[1], mapping[2]
    local value = get_nested_value(record, source)
    if value then
      if target:find("%.") then
        local current = output
        for segment in target:gmatch("[^%.]+") do
          if segment:match("%.[^%.]+$") then
            current[segment] = value
          else
            current = current[segment]
          end
        end
      else
        output[target] = value
      end
    end
  end

  -- Map activity type
  if output.activity_name then
    local activity = ACTIVITY_MAPPINGS[output.activity_name]
    if activity then
      output.activity_id = activity.id
      output.activity_name = activity.name
    end
  end

  -- Map status
  if output.status_detail then
    local status = STATUS_MAPPINGS[output.status_detail]
    if status then
      output.status_id = status.id
      output.status = status.name
    end
  end

  -- Validation and cleanup
  if not output.timestamp then
    output.timestamp = os_time() * 1000
  end

  -- Final validation
  if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
    return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
  end

  return output
end

deployment_steps: Upload LUA file to parser directory

monitoring_recommendations: Monitor transform() error rate - alert if >0.1%
Monitor memory usage - should be flat
